title: Blueprint
description: Schema for project blueprints that pre-configure architecture patterns, feature seeds, and build constraints

description.description: Short description shown in UI selector

forced_depth_mode.description: If set, overrides depth_mode selection. Null means user chooses.

reference_doc.description: Path to the reference markdown document (relative to project root)

architecture_context.description: Architecture summary injected into LLM prompts for outline and chapter generation

feature_seeds.description: Features automatically added to the catalog when this blueprint is selected

outline_context.description: Additional context injected into the outline generation prompt

chapter_context.description: Additional context injected into every chapter generation prompt
